  as={"h1"}

  children={"Return payload data response for the given query (chart-data-cache-key)"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/chart/data/{cache_key}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>

</MethodEndpoint>



Takes a query context cache key and returns payload data response for the given query.
